stemHtml: A pilot of a single engine aircraft performs a glide approach, maintaining a constant IAS. From 500 ft, the headwind gradually changes from 15 kt to 5 kt. What changes will the pilot have to make to the pitch of the aircraft, and how will this affect the glide path angle?

options.a: Pitch down, and this will significantly increase the glide angle. The pilot will undershoot the threshold.
options.b: No pitch change, and the glide angle will remain constant.
options.c: No pitch change, and the glide angle will become shallower. The pilot will overshoot the threshold.
options.d: Pitch up, and this will significantly decrease the glide angle.
